description: Flanged pipe section standing upright along Z axis, centered at origin in XY, with bottom and top flanges, central bore, and four bolt holes per flange
components: Bottom flange disc (OD=50mm, Z=0 to Z=5)
Pipe wall cylinder (OD=30mm, Z=0 to Z=50)
Top flange disc (OD=50mm, Z=45 to Z=50)
Central bore (ID=20mm, full length Z=0 to Z=50)
Four bolt holes (D=6mm, bolt circle D=40mm, at 0/90/180/270 deg, through both flanges)

features.description: 9 hole(s) of diameter 20mm bore + 6mm bolt holes (x8 total, 4 per flange) mm

notes: Build solid by unioning three cylinders first (bottom flange, pipe wall, top flange), then subtract central bore cylinder (D=20mm, full Z height). For bolt holes: use pushPoints with four XY offsets at radius=20mm on 0/90/180/270 degree positions, drill D=6mm cylinders through bottom flange (Z=0 to Z=5) and separately through top flange (Z=45 to Z=50). Ensure all cylinders are centered on Z axis. The bore cut must pass completely through (add small epsilon overcut on Z if needed). CadQuery implementation should use Workplane('XY') at appropriate Z offsets for each feature.
